name: RadiFi Credit Union - Northside
description_short: RadiFi Credit Union's Northside Jacksonville branch offers member banking with checking, savings, loans, and mortgage services since 1935.
description_long:
RadiFi Credit Union has served the Jacksonville area for nearly 90 years, with the Northside branch located at 1440-31 Dunn Ave. in Jacksonville, FL 32218. The credit union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative, differentiating it from traditional banks through member-focused governance and shared profitability.

The Northside branch provides comprehensive banking services including deposit accounts (checking, savings, certificates of deposit), lending products (auto loans, mortgages, business loans), and transaction services. Current promotional offerings include a 13-Month Certificate Special at 3.75% APY, High-Yield Checking up to 4.00% APY, auto loan refinancing with 0.25% rate reduction, home mortgage cash back incentives, and a Visa credit card with 1.90% intro APR. The branch maintains a 24-hour ATM, coin counting machine, safe deposit boxes, wire transfer services, and notary services.

As a credit union rather than a bank, RadiFi emphasizes member benefits and competitive rates on savings products. The branch has achieved a 3.9-star rating with 206 certified reviews, with documented positive member experiences. They offer digital banking options including mobile banking apps and online account opening, plus specialized services through mortgage loan originators (NMLS-registered), commercial loan officers, and wealth advisors.

The Northside location operates Monday-Friday 9am-5pm and Saturday 9am-1pm with no drive-up window. Members can access products online or through the physical branch. The organization maintains standard holiday closures and provides referral incentives ($25 for friend referrals). However, as a credit union, membership eligibility requirements may apply, and products/rates are subject to standard underwriting and qualification criteria.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Competitive savings rates: 13-Month CD at 3.75% APY and High-Yield Checking up to 4.00% APY
Established 90-year history (since 1935) providing stability and local community presence
Comprehensive service suite: mortgages, auto loans, business loans, wire transfers, safe deposit boxes, notary services
24-hour ATM on-site and free coin counting for members
NMLS-registered mortgage loan originators (Jim Bystrzycki #1000667, Erika Baker #989622) for home financing
Strong member satisfaction: 3.9-star rating with 206 certified reviews
Mobile banking app and online account opening for convenience
cons: No drive-up window at Northside location, requiring in-person lobby visits during business hours
Limited Saturday hours (9am-1pm only) with Sunday closure, restricting weekend access
Credit union membership requirements may apply, potentially restricting eligibility compared to banks
Generic product descriptions on website lack specific APRs for standard checking/savings accounts outside promotions
Limited branch presence (single Northside location information provided) compared to larger regional banks
best_for: Jacksonville residents seeking competitive savings rates on CDs and high-yield checking accounts
Homebuyers interested in mortgage refinancing or purchase financing with local NMLS-licensed originators
Small business owners needing commercial lending and business banking services
Credit union members valuing member-owned governance and profit-sharing benefits over traditional bank structures
diagnosis: RadiFi Credit Union's Northside branch is best for Jacksonville residents seeking member-owned banking with competitive savings rates and comprehensive lending services. Primary limitation is the lack of drive-up window and limited weekend hours; customers must visit the lobby during weekday business hours, and membership eligibility requirements may apply.
services: Auto loans and refinancing (0.25% rate reduction promotion)
Commercial loans and business banking services
Visa credit cards (1.90% intro APR promotion)
Money orders, cashier checks, notary services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
